query:
SELECT
            o.id,
            o.bookstore_id,
            o.status,
            o.total_amount,
            o.placed_at,
            COUNT(oi.id) AS item_count
        FROM orders o
        LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
        WHERE o.user_id = $1
          AND ($2::timestamptz IS NULL OR o.placed_at < $2)
          AND ($3::text IS NULL OR o.status = $3)
        GROUP BY o.id
        ORDER BY o.placed_at DESC
        LIMIT $4
